armor: Cheap and easy t0 produce combat vehicles are found on almost every inhabited world , VTOLs (Vertical Take Off and Landing helicopters and jet powered craft that can lift off and land without runway Highly maneuverable and capable of landing almost anywhere, VTOLs are often assigned t0 reconnaissance missions, where tneir relative fragility is less of liability: Cargo-carrying VTOLs Is0 transport troops ad supplies t0 and from remote hard: to reach locations Tracked vehicles such as tanks are the most resilient type of armor and can maneuver through all but the roughest terrain; Tneir slow speed is drawback. however; and their treads are often difficult to repair Or replace. Cheaper and easier t0 main- tain wheeled vehicles more common than their tracked cousins They tear uUp the roadways much less than tracked vehicles. making them ideal garrison troops_ Tney cannol easily traverse rough terrain however and often Bet stuck thick mud and bogs Hovercraft are the fastest ground vehicles and can go over water; where other vehicles cannot; However; they have drav backs as well Because they glide on pocket of forced ain Ihey cannot travel through even lightly wooded areas; Their airskirts also make tempting targets for enemy gunners; well-placed shot can easily cripple hovertank. The standard infantryman is the most common battlefield unit Infantry grunts are readily recruited and quickly trained basic combal Tney can aried with simple slug-throwing rifles Iaser weapons even shoulder mounted missiles They can also be trained t0 plant explosives that can cripple vehicles and even BattleMechs Several specialized combat vehicles are aiso in service across known space but their use IS limited. With the advent of space travel and the DropShip_ seafaring warships quickly became obsolete. The only waterborne naval vessels still in use simple patrol boats that guard planet'$ shorelines and waterways from pirates and other criminals. Conventional fight: er aircratt are the only specialized vehicles that still see wide- spread use. AAMORED INFANTRY Armored  infantry Dridge   the gap between the  standard infantry soldier and the BattleMech. Created t0 balance the Elemental infantry fielded by the Clans_ powered armor suits enable regular   infantrymen damage even destroy BattleMechs, Fielded in large quantities_ armored troops can decimate unprepared enemy: In close quarters_ such as urban combat boarding actions they provide the additional protection and firepower needed t0 overwhelm larger and better- prepared enemy; Though the first Inner Sphere battle-armor suits entered pro duction ess than decade ago. almost dozen different designs are already in service Many are specialized for particu- types of missions: tew can handle any combat environment; Each major Inner Sphere power fields several regiments of battle armor These units are never deployed as regiments_ now ever. because each House military Owns relatively few armor suits. DROPSHIPS, JUMPShiPS AND WARshiPS Though most DropShips and JumpShips are not designat: ed as combat units they are as integral to thirty-first-century military force as armor and the autocannon: They are the Ilife line that connects human occupied worlds the only way t0 trav across the stars_ DropShips may be aerodyne spheroid in shape Some specialized DropShips; called assault ships, designed for space and aerial attacks. CONVENTIONAL FORCES Hign tech combat units such as BattleMechs may get all the attention; but conventional forces often bear the brunt of combat.
